name: better-write
title: Better Write
description: Make AI-assisted rewrites sound natural and human.
author: sushant_jarial

commands.name: fix-grammar
commands.title: Fix Grammar
commands.description: Fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation in the selected text

commands.name: rephrase
commands.title: Rephrase
commands.description: Rephrase the selected text for clarity and flow

commands.name: make-friendly
commands.title: Make Friendly
commands.description: Rewrite the selected text in a warm, friendly tone

commands.name: make-professional
commands.title: Make Professional
commands.description: Rewrite the selected text in a professional tone

commands.name: expand
commands.title: Expand
commands.description: Expand the selected text to provide more detail and depth

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: API key for your OpenAI-compatible provider

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Base URL
preferences.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Examples: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1, https://api.groq.com/openai/v1, http://localhost:11434/v1 (Ollama)

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: Model name as expected by your provider

preferences.name: fixGrammarPrompt
preferences.title: Fix Grammar Prompt
preferences.default: Fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation in the user's text. Preserve meaning, voice, and formatting. Return only the corrected text, with no preamble, explanation, or quotation marks.
preferences.description: System prompt used by Fix Grammar

preferences.name: rephrasePrompt
preferences.title: Rephrase Prompt
preferences.default: Rephrase the user's text to improve clarity and flow while keeping the meaning and approximate length. Return only the rewritten text, with no preamble, explanation, or quotation marks.

preferences.name: friendlyPrompt
preferences.title: Friendly Prompt
preferences.default: Rewrite the user's text in a warm, friendly, conversational tone. Keep the meaning intact. Return only the rewritten text, with no preamble, explanation, or quotation marks.
preferences.description: System prompt used by Make Friendly

preferences.name: professionalPrompt
preferences.title: Professional Prompt
preferences.default: Rewrite the user's text in a clear, professional tone suitable for business communication. Keep the meaning intact. Return only the rewritten text, with no preamble, explanation, or quotation marks.
preferences.description: System prompt used by Make Professional

preferences.name: expandPrompt
preferences.title: Expand Prompt
preferences.default: Expand the user's text to provide more detail and depth while maintaining the original meaning. Return only the expanded text, with no preamble, explanation, or quotation marks.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
